title: PvP Essentials (Updated!)
description: Player Health Indicators, fullbright, removed overlays, smaller items, low fire, small totem pop, low shield, smaller items, and more
body:
If you want to suggest anything, report a bug, or vote on future packs, then [join my discord](https://discord.gg/gymTft2GbV)
Description Hello there! This texture pack is great for pvpers, as it includes everything that they might need. While this pack might take a bit to get used to, pretty soon you won't be able to play Minecraft without it!

This pack can be overlayed on any other pack, and your textures will remain. This pack will just clean up what needs to be cleaned up and will leave you to play how you like.
Features Fullbright and No Fog:
With pvp essentials, you can always see in the dark and see further than ever!
No Water and Lava Overlay:
You can now see in both water and lava, leading to quicker navigation.
Small items and Overlay Remover:
Foods and totems are now smaller, and annoying overlays are removed.
Less Particles and Dangerous Blocks:
Don't worry, powder snow blocks also have a red outline!
Feature List
  • No heart blinking
  • Fullbright (1.21.2+)
  • Smaller held items
  • Players show you their held items
  • Removed some particles
    - all big_smoke particles were removed
    - effect_0 to effect_4, effect_6 + effect_7
    - all explosion particles
    - flame + soul_fire_flame
    - all generic particles
    - lava pop particles
    - all splash particles
  • totem pop particles are smaller
  • enchants + effects are shown in latin numbers instead of roman numerals
  • removed various overlays
    - nausea (set distortion effects to "off" in accessibility settings)
    - vignette
    - pumpkin blur
    - fire
  • shadows are squares to more accurately show where someone is standing
  • in world fire and soul fire are two pixels tall for better visibility
  • red outlines around dangerous blocks
    - powdered snow
    - tripwires
    - infested blocks
  • water texture is more transparent
  • smaller totem overlay
  • smaller shield blocking
  • invisibility particles are easier to see
  • removed nametag backgrounds
  • cleaner hitboxes (f3+b)
    - removed all colors other than white
    - hitboxes fade out as they get further
Issues Hey, if you find an issue or want to suggest something, please contact me with my discord. I will usually respond fairly quickly if you need help
Discord: AlphaLeoli#6338 Discord Server! YouTube: AlphaLeoli
https://www.alphaleo.li/resourcepacks
